headline: Viking, Cruises Decline. U.S. Names These Destinations Unsafe.
summary: Viking Cruise stock trades below a buy point amid Q4 results, capacity growth. Rivals Royal Caribbean, Carnival, Norwegian continue to fall.

headline: CELEBRITY CRUISES RELAUNCHES CELEBRITY SOLSTICE WITH EIGHT NEW EXPERIENCES
summary: Celebrity Cruises' revitalized Celebrity Solstice set sail from Singapore on March 2, unveiling eight new experiences, including four spaces that are new to Celebrity – Trattoria Rossa, Sunset Park, The Parlor, and Boulevard Lounge – marking the beginning of the cruise line's major revitalization of its Solstice Series ships. Bow-to-stern enhancements also include refreshed accommodations – with updates to all existing staterooms, plus an additional 54 staterooms and four new stateroom categorie

headline: Iran, Dip-Buyers & a Rare Buffett Stumble: Wall Street Shakes Off Its Worst Fears
summary: U.S. and Israeli strikes on Iran rattled markets at the open, but seasoned dip-buyers pushed the major indices back to near-flat by the close. Meanwhile, Berkshire Hathaway's post-Buffett era gets off to a rocky start, and energy and defense stocks surge.
